query: Hades II v1.0 final development phase true ending no plans additional regions encounters abilities official statement site:supergiantgames.com

{"query":"Hades II v1.0 final development phase true ending no plans additional regions encounters abilities official statement site:supergiantgames.com","model":"mako","response_time_ms":1744,"verdict":null,"extra_info":null,"results":[{"url":"https://mobalytics.gg/hades-2/guides/post-launch-patch-1","title":"Hades 2 New Ending, Reset Story & All Hidden Changes in Patch 1","content":"Life Tax (Hades): increased effectiveness; restorative effect is no longer reduced by Vow of Scars (Oath)
Check HookieDookie's Circe Staff build guide to learn how to create a super OP Scorch Cast build using the new update!
Now you're going to lose the bonus Gigaros Dash Boon if you deactivate Fate's Whim.
A common plan is using Gorgon Amulet in the 3rd or 4th region for either Stalwart Stand or Renewed Faith.
As part of this, increased the number of Underworld clears required, and added to and revised parts of the main True Ending scenes before the end credits."},{"url":"https://www.rockpapershotgun.com/hades-2-post-launch-patch-1-revamps-melinoes-true-ending-and-is-out-now-in-steam-preview-form","title":"Hades 2 post-launch patch 1 revamps Melinoë's "true ending", and is out now in Steam preview form | Rock Paper Shotgun","content":"Hence, in the roguelike's first proper post-launch patch they've just put out as a Steam preview, some "true ending enhancements" being rolled out like a boon from a sassy god.
In terms of their true ending tweaks, the studio say they've added some extra events with key characters you'll run into both before and after completing Melinoë's task.
"A number of character-related Prophecies, including the one connected to the story epilogue, should unfold faster than before," reads another of the patch's headline changes, while the decor you can buy for the crossroads now costs less spirit kudos points."},{"url":"https://www.gamesradar.com/games/hades/hades-2-devs-are-changing-the-true-ending-so-much-youre-going-to-have-to-beat-the-underworld-a-few-more-times-to-see-it-all/","title":"Hades 2 devs are changing the true ending so much you're going to have to beat the Underworld a few more times to see it all | GamesRadar+","content":"Standing as perhaps the most significant change, there are "true ending enhancements" that alter the route leading up to the true ending with "new events in the lead up," as well as "some" after it.
What's more, the dev assures, "any excess Kudos you have already spent will be refunded." The full update contains a plethora of other tweaks, so it's worth giving the Hades 2 patch notes a full read – and making sure to opt in to the Steam Beta branch.
Read through our Hades 2 review to learn more about what might just be one of this year's most impressive new games yet."},{"url":"https://www.kitguru.net/gaming/joao-silva/hades-2-patch-1-preview-changes-the-games-ending-but-only-slightly/","title":"Hades 2 Patch 1 Preview changes the game’s ending, but only slightly | KitGuru","content":"Hot on the heels of the successful 1.0 launch of Hades II, developer Supergiant Games has already rolled out the first preview patch on Steam.
The focus of this patch seems to be refining the game's “true ending” experience based on early player feedback, but it also includes bug fixes and balance adjustments.
Supergiant appears to agree, using this first post-launch update to add more narrative weight to Melinoë's final objective.
The patch notes detail the addition of more events featuring key characters both before and after the final encounter, along with revisions to parts of the closing sequence itself before the credits roll."},{"url":"https://screenrant.com/hades-2-true-ending-how-to-unlock/","title":"Hades 2: How To Unlock The True Ending","content":"The true ending of Hades 2 is tied to the final defeat of Chronos, but only using an Incantation that directly targets the Titan of Time.
Once you beat Chronos a number of times, Zagreus will leave Gigaros on his bed in the House of Hades, allowing you to take it and bring it back to the Crossroads hub."}]}

{"query":"Hades II v1.0 final development phase true ending no plans additional regions encounters abilities official statement","follow_up_questions":null,"answer":null,"images":[],"results":[{"url":"http://supergiantgames.com/blog/hades2-unseen-update","title":"HADES II: Spread Fear in The Unseen Update | Supergiant Games","content":"Title: HADES II: Spread Fear in The Unseen Update | Supergiant Games
# HADES II: Spread Fear in The Unseen Update. Our third **Major Update** for ***Hades II*** is finally here, focused on expanding core combat, Guardian encounters, and character relationships, with lots of new visual flair! With **The Unseen Update**, expect ***Hades II*** to be bigger and better than before:. This update also features lots of new artwork and visual flourishes, exciting new music tracks such as the one in our new trailer, new Warden encounters, many new story events, and more. **The Unseen Update** is a free, automatic download as part of the Early Access version of ***Hades II*** on Steam and the Epic Games Store. As always, the complete Patch Notes are available on Steam, in the game client, in the form of a dramatic reading *(see below)*, and in our official Discord, where you can join a welcoming community of ***Hades II*** players and Supergiant fans. After more than a year of Early Access development, we're now starting to prepare for our v1.0 launch! We're heading into the final phase of ***Hades II*** development, which involves adding the story's true ending and other finishing touches. In terms of what we're working on, after any follow-up patches to **The Unseen Update** that smooth out any issues, we'll focus on these major initiatives: **· The True Ending:** The conclusion of Princess Melinoë's story is the main addition we're planning for our v1.0 launch. **· Finishing Touches**: We're continuing to polish and refine all the content we've introduced in ***Hades II***, from Boons and powers to artwork and story events. Sometimes the last stretch of development on a game can make all the difference, so we have always taken this phase seriously and appreciate your continued support. As we wind down our Early Access phase, our goal remains ensuring we've created our biggest, most replayable, most feature-rich game yet, and — most importantly — a worthy successor to the original ***Hades***. This also means some of the most important work on ***Hades II*** is still to come, so *may moonlight guide us!* And to all our Early Access players, thank you for being here, and sharing your impressions of **The Unseen Update** with us.","score":0.8312667,"raw_content":null,"domain":"supergiantgames.com","popularity_score":2.763620052257021,"main_topic":"entertainment"},{"url":"http://www.supergiantgames.com/blog/hades2-unseen-update","title":"HADES II: Spread Fear in The Unseen Update | Supergiant Games","content":"Title: HADES II: Spread Fear in The Unseen Update | Supergiant Games

# HADES II: Spread Fear in The Unseen Update. Our third **Major Update** for ***Hades II*** is finally here, focused on expanding core combat, Guardian encounters, and character relationships, with lots of new visual flair! With **The Unseen Update**, expect ***Hades II*** to be bigger and better than before:. * **Forge Bonds** with a variety of characters in many new optional story events that bring you closer than before. This update also features lots of new artwork and visual flourishes, exciting new music tracks such as the one in our new trailer, new Warden encounters, many new story events, and more. We're excited to hear what you think of it all! **The Unseen Update** is a free, automatic download as part of the Early Access version of ***Hades II*** on Steam and the Epic Games Store. After more than a year of Early Access development, we're now starting to prepare for our v1.0 launch! We're heading into the final phase of ***Hades II*** development, which involves adding the story's true ending and other finishing touches. Please note we do not yet have a v1.0 launch date, though we'll share more as soon as we can. In terms of what we're working on, after any follow-up patches to **The Unseen Update** that smooth out any issues, we'll focus on these major initiatives: **· The True Ending:** The conclusion of Princess Melinoë's story is the main addition we're planning for our v1.0 launch. While we can't yet say when our v1.0 launch will be, we're very excited to be getting close, and to share the complete experience with you. This also means some of the most important work on ***Hades II*** is still to come, so *may moonlight guide us!* And to all our Early Access players, thank you for being here, and sharing your impressions of **The Unseen Update** with us.
